title: Achoriphragma maidantalicum
taxonomy: Achoriphragma maidantalicum is classified within the family Campanulaceae, which comprises various flowering plants commonly known as bellflowers or lobelias. This classification places Achoriphragma maidantalicum among the Campanuloidae clade, a group of flowering plants known for their bell-shaped flowers and distinctive leaf structures. The Campanulaceae family is divided into several subfamilies, with Achoriphragma maidantalicum being a part of the Campanuloideae subfamily. The Campanuloideae subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Achoriphragma maidantalicum being part of the Campanuleae tribe. Achoriphragma maidantalicum's classification is also sometimes placed within the Lobelioideae subfamily, but this is a matter of ongoing research and debate.
